programs.title: The Good Doctor
programs.desc: Salen takes extreme measures when she learns that the surgical staff have joined Lim's efforts against her; the team treats a liver transplant patient whose organ donor unwittingly gave him cancer.

programs.title: Pretty Little Liars
programs.desc: With Alison leading them down a dangerous path and 'A' barring them from telling the police the truth, Aria, Emily, Hanna and Spencer feel trapped and are desperate to find a way out of this mess.

programs.desc: Spencer faces a decision that could transform his reputation, Billy realizes he needs to make major changes, and Grace and Corey have a tough conversation about their family.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina get a good lead. The home is dirty and dated, with a large fireplace in the center that will cost a fortune to update.

programs.title: Crikey! It's The Irwins
programs.desc: After historical wildfires strike Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri help the severely injured koala population.
